narrative:
New Russia Township has 1,699 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.6%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.4 percentage points.
